How can I apply for the FIRST EA₹N credit card?
Register and verify your details here. > Create your fixed deposit > Complete your KYC process > Your FIRST EA₹N Credit Card is ready!
What are the eligibility criteria to apply for a FIRST EA₹N Credit Card?
The eligibility criteria for the FIRST EA₹N Credit Card are:
· Age Limit Criteria: 18 to 80 years​​
· The applicant must qualify as an Indian resident with a current and permanent residential address in India
· You need to create and maintain a minimum fixed deposit of ₹5,000
· The final decision is at the Bank’s sole discretion, in line with our internal policies, and notwithstanding the applicant meeting the above credit card criteria.
Do I require a credit history or income proof to apply for the FIRST EA₹N Credit Card?
No, you do not need any credit history or income proof to apply for the FIRST EA₹N Credit Card.
Is there an add-on card available for the FIRST EA₹N Credit Card?
Since the FIRST EA₹N Credit Card is an FD-backed, the add-on card facility isn’t available. However, you can easily apply for your own FIRST EA₹N card  here . It’s an assured card for everyone!
What will determine my credit limit?
With FIRST EA₹N you get 100% Credit Limit of your Fixed Deposit value.​
What offers are available on IDFC FIRST Bank Credit Cards?
IDFC FIRST Bank Credit Cards provide a host of benefits, offers and features. Depending on the variant, IDFC FIRST Bank credit cards offer lifestyle benefits like discounts on shopping, dining, and movies. Benefits include discounts at health and wellness outlets, and in-app online discounts.
I am receiving an error message while paying with the FIRST EA₹N Credit Card? What should I do?
Customers can report UPI merchant related issues to NPCI via their official website, under the “UPI Complaint” section. Link to raise a complaint with NPCI:
https://www.npci.org.in/what-we-do/upi/dispute-redressal-mechanism
What does the FIRST EA₹N Credit Card benefit me?
The FIRST EA₹N Credit Card gives you cashback on every purchase. You get 1% cashback on UPI payments made via the IDFC FIRST Bank mobile app. All online spending and UPI payments via other apps earn you 0.5% cashback.
What is a virtual credit card?
It's a virtual credit card that exists exclusively online, without any physical form. It has a unique card number, expiration date, and CVV, which makes online transactions more secure.
You can use the Virtual FIRST EA₹N Credit Card anywhere, once you’ve linked it to a UPI app:
· Make online transactions by entering your card details or via UPI
· Pay at offline shops by scanning QR codes with your UPI app
Without a physical card in your wallet, there are lower chances of theft or misuse. All you need is your smartphone, and you’re good to go.
How can I access my FIRST EA₹N Virtual credit card?
You can access your FIRST EA₹N credit card through the IDFC FIRST mobile banking app.
Can I request a physical card for my FIRST EARN virtual credit card?
Your FIRST EARN Credit Card is issued as a virtual card, so you can conveniently use it for your online and UPI spends.​
In case you need a physical card as well, you can request one by calling 1800 10888. An issuance fee of ₹199 + GST will be applicable, and the card will be delivered to your registered address.
What are the cashback benefits of the FIRST EA₹N secured credit card?
You can earn 1% cashback on UPI spends through the IDFC FIRST Bank mobile app and 0.5% cashback through third-party UPI platforms like Phonepe, GPay, Paytm etc and all online spends. You will get 0.5% cashback on utility, insurance, and wallet loads.
Cash withdrawal and EMI transactions are excluded from cashback offers.
How can I earn cashback on the FIRST EA₹N Credit Card?
You can earn cashback by using the credit card for UPI, E-commerce and POS transactions.
How much cashback can I earn in a statement cycle?
You can earn cashback* of ₹500 in a statement cycle.​
Cash withdrawal and EMI transactions are excluded from cashback benefits.​
​*Cashback will be earned for spends up to your credit limit per billing cycle. Additional spends beyond this will not be eligible for cashback, including transactions enabled through repayments and subsequent re-utilisation within the same billing cycle.​
​*Cashback will be credited 1 day after Payment Due Date, subject to payment realisation of at least the Minimum Amount Due on or before the Payment Due Date. If for any reason the Minimum Amount Due is not realised by the Payment Due Date, cashback earned for that statement will be forfeited.​
My cashback for the current statement shows negative balance. What does it mean?
If you cancel, reverse, or return your purchase, your cashback will be reversed. Reversals for such transactions will be adjusted/deducted from your monthly statement cashback.
For instance: A UPI transaction of ₹10,000 through the IDFC FIRST Bank mobile app made on 21st April would qualify for a cashback of 1%, or ₹100, assuming the statement was generated on 22nd April. As a result, you will be credited with ₹100 on PDD+1 i.e. 8th May (provided you at least paid MAD by PDD i.e. 7th May). Let’s say you returned an item on 24th April. The cashback of ₹100 will be reversed due to the return and will be adjusted/deducted in your next statement.​
Is there any welcome offer benefit on the FIRST EA₹N Credit Card?
Yes, you can earn 10% cashback up to ₹250 on your first transaction, done within 15 days of card generation. Card generation refers to the point at which your card is created along with FD funding.
Note: Welcome benefit is limited time offer and applicable for new cards issued on or after 16 Dec'25
Will I earn cashback on fuel transactions using the FIRST EA₹N credit card?
Yes, with your FIRST EA₹N Credit Card, you will get cashback on fuel transactions.
Where can I see the cashback earned on my FIRST EA₹N credit card?
The eligible cashback will be visible in the statement, however the cashback will be credited 1 day after Payment Due Date, subject to payment realisation of at least the Minimum Amount Due on or before the Payment Due Date. If for any reason the Minimum Amount Due is not realised by the Payment Due Date, cashback earned for that statement will be forfeited.​
When will I receive my cashback?
Cashback will be credited 1 day after Payment Due Date, subject to payment realisation of at least the Minimum Amount Due on or before the Payment Due Date. If for any reason the Minimum Amount Due is not realised by the Payment Due Date, cashback earned for that statement will be forfeited.​
Will my cashback expire?
No, your cashback doesn’t expire, however your cashback is subject to payment realisation of at least the Minimum Amount Due on or before the Payment Due Date. If for any reason the Minimum Amount Due is not realised by the Payment Due Date, cashback earned for that statement will be forfeited.​
Is there any annual renewal benefit on the FIRST EA₹N Credit Card?
FIRST EA₹N credit card comes with spend based annual fee waiver. Your annual fee of ₹499+GST is waived if you spend ₹1,00,000* or more in your previous anniversary year
* ₹1,00,000 spends milestone includes all the purchases (excluding ATM Cash withdrawal, monthly EMIs, fees and charges) net of reversals/refunds
What are the benefits of having a credit card against a fixed deposit?
Here are the benefits of a credit card backed by an FD:
1.  No income proof required :  Customers can obtain a credit card without providing any income proof. Besides working professionals, this is useful for homemakers, students, and freelancers.
2.  Helps build credit history : Using your credit card regularly and paying off the outstanding dues on time will help create a good credit history and credit score.
3.   Earn interest on fixed deposit : Cardholders can continue to earn interest on their fixed deposits, while enjoying free credit for up to 45 days.
Which fixed deposits can be used for applying for the FIRST EA₹N Credit Card?
Only singly-held fixed deposits will be eligible for the FIRST EA₹N Credit Card.
The Fixed Deposits opened/placed by HUFs, Partnership firms/society/trust, minors or opened jointly by applicant/s, Tax Saver or Flexi-Deposits (Auto-sweep Fixed Deposits) are not eligible for the FIRST EA₹N Credit Card .
What is UPI on Credit Card?
UPI on credit cards is a feature that allows you to link your credit card with the UPI (Unified Payments Interface) system. It enables seamless and secure payments directly from your credit card using UPI apps like Google Pay, PhonePe, and Paytm. As a result, you enjoy both the convenience of UPI payments and the benefits of a credit card.
How can I link my FIRST EA₹N Credit Card to UPI?
Complete your UPI app registration journey with your registered mobile number and follow these simple steps to enable your FIRST EA₹N Credit Card for payments:
1.  Open UPI app and choose Add RuPay Credit Card
2.  Select IDFC FIRST Bank and your eligible cards will be displayed
3.   Select your FIRST EA₹N Credit Card, enter the last 6 digits of your card, card expiry and OTP to complete your registration
Is my Credit Card PIN and UPI PIN the same?
No, it is not. You need to generate a new UPI PIN to perform UPI payments.
To generate a UPI PIN, follow these steps:
On your UPI app profile, select RuPay Credit Cards > Add RuPay Credit Card on UPI > Select the issuer Bank from the list> Card will auto display last 4 digits > select your RuPay credit card > Set 4-digit UPI PIN> Confirm 4-digit UPI PIN.
To generate/change your Credit Card PIN, follow these steps:
Open your IDFC FIRST Mobile App> Credit Cards> Set new PIN> Confirm your 4-Digit-Credit Card PIN
Note: As the user, it is your choice whether you wish to keep the Credit Card PIN and UPI PIN the same or not.
Can I send UPI payments to individuals or other credit cards using my FIRST EA₹N Credit Card?
No, only merchant payments, as authorized by NPCI, are permitted to use the RuPay Credit Card.
Is there any limit on UPI transactions?
Post UPI PIN generation of your FIRST EA₹N Credit Card, you can transact only up to ₹5,000 for the first 24 hours.
Can I make UPI payments through my Credit Card as well?
UPI payments are now available to IDFC FIRST Bank Credit Card users. While not every merchant has a point-of-sale machine, almost every store in India has a QR code for UPI payments. With a UPI-enabled IDFC FIRST Bank Credit Card, you can use your card to pay via across both physical and online stores.
On which UPI app can I register my FIRST EA₹N Credit Card?
You can link your FIRST EA₹N Credit Card on all UPI apps such as BHIM, PhonePe, PayTm, Gpay, Freecharge, Slice, CRED, and Mobikwik.
Are there certain merchants where I can't use my credit card on UPI?
Yes, the restricted categories include digital account openings, lending platforms, cash withdrawals at merchants or ATMs, e-RUPI, IPOs, Foreign Inward Remittances, Mutual Funds, and any others specified by the National Payment Corporation of India (NPCI).
For more details on RuPay Credit card on UPI refer NPCI website.
https://www.npci.org.in/what-we-do/rupay/rupay-credit-card-on-upi
Can I set my linked credit card as the default account to receive funds?
No, you cannot set your credit card as the default for receiving funds.
Why I am being asked to make a Fixed Deposit?
The FIRST EA₹N Credit Card is issued against a Fixed Deposit. Hence, to set your credit limit, you need to create an FD. Upon successful creation of your FD, a lien will be marked on 100% of the FD value.
Once done, your FD will be linked to your FIRST EA₹N Credit Card and your credit limit will be set.
Is there a Joining fee on FIRST EA₹N Credit Card?
The FIRST EA₹N Credit Card comes with the Joining Fee of ₹0 ₹499 + GST (limited time offer, for new cards issued on or after  16 Dec'25 )
Is there an Annual fee on FIRST EA₹N Credit Card?
The FIRST EA₹N Credit Card comes with the Annual fee (2nd year onwards) of ₹499 + GST.
Your ₹499+GST annual fee is waived if you spend ₹1,00,000* or more in your previous anniversary year
* ₹1,00,000 spends milestone includes all the purchases (excluding ATM Cash withdrawal, monthly EMIs, fees and charges) net of reversals/refunds
Is there an Annual Fee Waiver on the FIRST EA₹N Credit Card?
Yes, your annual fee of ₹499+GST will be waived when you spend ₹1,00,000* or more in your previous anniversary year
*₹1,00,000 spends milestone includes all the purchases (excluding ATM Cash withdrawal, monthly EMIs, fees and charges) net of reversals/refunds
Which spends are eligible for the Annual Fee Waiver?
₹1,00,000 spends milestone includes all the purchases (excluding ATM Cash withdrawal, monthly EMIs, fees and charges) net of reversals/refunds
What is the interest rate on my credit card?
IDFC FIRST Bank Credit Cards offers among the lowest interest rates in the country, so it won’t weigh on your pocket if you can’t clear your entire monthly dues occasionally. IDFC FIRST Bank offers interest rates starting from 8.5% per annum. In contrast, other credit cards in the market charge interest as high as 43.8% p.a. if you carry forward your balances.
Is there any movie offer on FIRST EARN Credit Card?
Yes. With FIRST EARN, you get 25% off up to ₹100 every month on movie ticket bookings made through District by Zomato. This benefit can be availed once per calendar month and is subject to availability on the platform. ​​
To avail the movie benefit in the next month, you need to stay spend-active with any transaction in the current calendar month.​​
​​
For example, to avail the movie benefit in July 2026, you must have made at least one transaction in June 2026 calendar month.​
What will be my credit limit?
You will get 100% of your FD value as your Credit Limit for FIRST EARN Credit Card.
Can I increase my FIRST EARN Credit Card’s limit?
Yes, you can instantly increase your FIRST EARN Credit Card limit by linking your existing FD or booking a new FD through the IDFC FIRST Bank Mobile App. Click here to get started.​
What are the benefits of increasing a credit card limit?
• Improved credit score: Your credit score is calculated based on several factors including your credit utilization ratio. By increasing your credit cards’ credit limit, you can increase your available credit and improve your credit score.
• Increased purchasing power: A high credit card limit means more purchasing power. This can be especially beneficial when emergency costs arise or for making large purchases.
Can I reduce the credit limit of my FIRST EARN Credit Card?
Your credit limit gives you higher spending power and helps you make the most of your card benefits along with merchant offers all year long.
However, if you wish to reduce your credit limit and have multiple FDs linked to your FIRST EARN Credit card account, you may delink one or more Fixed Deposits linked to your FIRST EARN credit card.
Please note:
• At least one FD must remain linked to the credit card after FD delinking,
• The remaining FD value after delinking must be higher than the minimum FD requirement for FIRST EARN Credit Card (₹5,000).
• Your outstanding credit card dues should not exceed the remaining FD balance after delinking.
• FD Delinking eligibility is subject to bank’s internal terms and conditions.
What does delinking an FD mean?
If you have multiple Fixed Deposits (FDs) linked to your FIRST EARN credit card, you can choose to remove one or more FDs from the credit card. This process is called FD delinking.
The lien marked on the delinked FD will be removed. After this, it will no longer be considered for calculating your credit limit. As a result, your credit limit will be reduced, and your revised credit limit will be equal to the 100% of the remaining FD(s) amount.
How can I initiate the FD delinking journey?
You can initiate the FD delinking request through the IDFC FIRST Bank Mobile App by navigating to:
Quick Actions under your FIRST EARN Credit Card → Manage Linked FD(s) → Delink FD.
Your revised credit limit will be updated instantly after your FD delinking request is successfully processed.
Please note:
• This feature is available only for customers who have multiple FDs linked to their FIRST EARN Credit Card.
• At least one FD must remain linked to the credit card after FD delinking,
• The remaining FD value after delinking must be higher than the minimum FD requirement for FIRST EARN Credit Card (₹5,000).
• Your outstanding credit card dues should not exceed the remaining FD balance after delinking.
• FD Delinking eligibility is subject to bank’s internal terms and conditions.

Digital RuPay Credit Card for UPI: Credit Meets Daily UPI Payments
Embrace the power of digital payments with the FIRST Digital RuPay Credit Card. Linked directly to UPI, this virtual card lets you enjoy effortless scan-and-pay transactions, online purchases, and instant rewards. With the card being entirely digital, it offers 3X reward points on every UPI transaction and comes pooled with your existing IDFC FIRST Bank Credit Cards in terms of credit limit and rewards. Perfect for trend-savvy users, it ensures that your payments are faster, smarter, and more rewarding.
Features of FIRST Digital RuPay Credit Card
Here’s what makes it unique
Get your FIRST Digital RuPay Credit Card issued for UPI instantly
Earn reward points with credit card-linked UPI payments
This digital card is linked to your existing credit limit
Digital-only card - go plastic free!
(no physical card will be issued)
Earn Rewards on UPI transactions with our RuPay Credit Card
3X rewards on UPI spends above ₹2,000
Earn 1X rewards
on UPI spends less than or equal to ₹2,000
Earn 1X rewards
on all utility* and insurance payments
Common Rewards Account for your digital credit card and existing IDFC FIRST Bank Credit Card
Reward structure for FIRST Digital RuPay Credit Card linked to FIRST SWYP Credit Card:
100 Reward Points on every UPI spend of ₹5,000 in a statement month.
Reward structure for FIRST Digital RuPay Credit Card linked to Gaj: Credit Card:
1 Reward Point per ₹150 UPI Spends

Step-by-Step Guide to link your RuPay credit card to UPI
Download the IDFC FIRST Mobile Banking app ( Google Play | App Store )
01
Go to the Credit cards section and select your RuPay Credit Card
02
Tap on ‘Click for card details’ on the card face to access your card details
03
Note the last 6 digits and expiry of your FIRST Digital RuPay Credit card
Please note: The mobile number registered on UPI should be same as the one linked to your IDFC FIRST Bank Credit Card.

Frequently Asked Questions
What is a FIRST Digital RuPay Credit Card?
The FIRST Digital RuPay Credit Card is a new digital credit card issued against your existing IDFC FIRST Bank credit cards for enabling UPI transactions.
Which IDFC FIRST Bank Credit Cards are eligible for obtaining the FIRST Digital RuPay Credit Card?
You can currently get the add-on FIRST Digital RuPay Credit Card if you hold any of the following IDFC FIRST Bank Credit Cards: FIRST Classic, FIRST Millennia, FIRST WOW!, FIRST Select, FIRST Wealth, FIRST Private, FIRST SWYP, Ashva, Mayura, FIRST Business, Diamond Reserve or Gaj: Credit Card .
Will I receive a physical card?
The FIRST Digital RuPay Credit Card is a digital-only card. A physical card will not be issued.
Is there any Joining/Annual fee for FIRST Digital RuPay Credit Card?
Yes, there's a Joining fee of ₹199 + GST and an Annual fee (2 nd year onwards) of ₹199 + GST.
Joining and Annual fee is not applicable for FIRST Digital RuPay Credit Card issued with FIRST WOW! Black , Gaj: and Business Multiplier Credit Card.
Does my digital credit card come with a welcome offer?
Limited Period Introductory offer - 100% cashback of ₹200, i.e. up to ₹50 each, on first 4 UPI transactions done within 15 days of card issuance.
Cashback will be credited to eligible customers within 60 days of card generation date. This offer is not applicable if the card is closed.
* Welcome offer of Rs.200 Cashback is not applicable for FIRST Digital RuPay Credit Cards issued without joining fee.
How can I earn ₹450 cashback offer on my FIRST Digital RuPay Credit Card?
For the FIRST Digital RuPay Credit Card created during 7th Jan to 31st March 2026, there is limited time offer to earn ₹250 cashback on 2 UPI spends. Customer needs to link their FIRST Digital RuPay Credit card on any UPI app such as PhonePe, Gpay, Paytm, CRED etc. and do two UPI transactions of ≥₹250 each within the campaign period (7th Jan to 31st March 2026) to get a flat cashback of ₹250. Fulfilment for this offer will be done within 60days of meeting the eligibility criteria. Click here for more details: https://www.idfcfirst.bank.in/credit-card/rupay-credit-card/npci-linkage-tnc
This is in addition to the welcome offer of 100% cashback up to ₹200 on first 4 UPI spends (of minimum Rs.50 each) within first 15 days of card creation on eligible FIRST Digital Card. So, customers who meet eligibility criteria for both offers can earn max ₹450 cashback on UPI spends (₹200 + ₹250) through these two offers.
Note: Welcome offer is only applicable for FIRST Digital RuPay Credit Card issued with Joining fee.
Do I earn reward points for UPI transactions with a Digital RuPay card?
Yes, you'll earn reward points based on the Credit Card type and transaction amount. Some exceptions apply, such as fuel, cash and EMI transactions. Reward points can be redeemed only through the primary Credit Card.
Reward structure for FIRST Digital UPI Card linked to FIRST Millennia, FIRST Classic, FIRST Select, FIRST Wealth, FIRST Family, FIRST WOW!, FIRST WOW! Black, FIRST Private, Ashva, Mayura, Diamond Reserve, FIRST Business & Business Multiplier Credit Card:
• 3X rewards on UPI purchases greater than ₹2,000.
• 1X rewards on all UPI purchases less than or equal to ₹2,000
• 1X on Insurance & Utility spends irrespective of transaction amount
1X = 1 reward point per X* spend | where X is ₹200 for FIRST Millennia, FIRST Classic, FIRST Select, FIRST Wealth, FIRST Family, FIRST WOW!, FIRST WOW! Black & Business Multiplier Credit Card.
For FIRST Private, Ashva , Mayura , Diamond Reserve  & FIRST Business Credit Card X is ₹150
1 Reward point = ₹ 0.25 (for FIRST Millennia, FIRST Classic, FIRST Select, FIRST Wealth, FIRST Family, FIRST WOW! , FIRST WOW! Black, FIRST Private, Ashva , Mayura , Diamond Reserve, FIRST Business & Business Multiplier Credit Card. )
Reward structure for FIRST Digital UPI Cards linked to FIRST SWYP Credit Card:
• 100 Reward points on UPI spends of ₹5,000 or more every statement.
Reward structure for FIRST Digital UPI Card linked to Gaj: Credit Card :
• 1X Reward point on UPI spends, i.e. Earn 1 Reward Point per ₹150 UPI Spends
1 Reward point = ₹ 0.25
For all Credit Cards, please note.
• Reward program is not applicable on Fuel (MCC 5172, 5541, 5542, 5983), Cash (MCC 6010, 6011,7280) & EMI transactions.
• UPI transactions will not be a part of 10X rewards programme and 10X threshold calculations for all cards (Except Ashva and Mayura) and Monthly Milestone rewards for FIRST SWYP Credit Card.
• Reward account for primary Credit Card and Digital Card will be same. Rewards redemption to be done from primary account only.
On which UPI apps can I register my FIRST Digital RuPay Credit Card?
You can link your FIRST Digital RuPay Credit Card on all UPI apps such as:
BHIM, PhonePe, Paytm, GPay, Freecharge, slice, CRED, and MobiKwik
How can I link my FIRST Digital RuPay Credit Card on UPI?
Complete your UPI app registration journey with your registered mobile number and follow.
3 simple steps to enable your FIRST Digital RuPay Credit Card for payments.
Open UPI app and choose "Add RuPay credit card”.
IDFC FIRST Bank, and your eligible IDFC FIRST Bank Credit Cards will be displayed
Select your card, enter last 6 digit of your card, card expiry and OTP to complete your registration!
Link your RuPay Credit Card to UPI
I changed my mobile number. How can I link my card on the UPI app?
Update your new number on your FIRST Digital RuPay Credit Card profile. Once updated, you can re-link your card on UPI apps.
Is my credit card PIN and UPI PIN same?
No, you need to generate a new UPI PIN to perform UPI payments.
To know, how to generate your UPI PIN click here
Can I change my UPI Pin?
Yes, you can modify your UPI pin through the 'Change UPI Pin' option in your UPI apps.
To know, how to generate your UPI PIN click here
Is there any limit on UPI transactions?
For first 24 hours of your FIRST Digital RuPay Credit Card post UPI PIN generation, you can do transaction up to ₹5,000.
Post that, your daily limit will be as per your credit card.
How to make payments using my FIRST Digital RuPay Credit Card?
Follow below these steps to pay using your FIRST Digital RuPay Credit Card –
Open UPI app and click Scan the merchant QR
Enter the amount to be paid to the merchant
Select the FIRST Digital RuPay Credit Card from the dropdown under ‘choose account to pay with’
Click on ‘Pay’ and authenticate with your UPI PIN
Payment confirmation will be displayed.
Can I use my FIRST Digital RuPay Credit Card with any merchant?
You can make payments to millions of merchants registered on UPI using a QR code. NPCI teams are working to expand the eligible merchants for UPI.
Can I make online purchases using my FIRST Digital RuPay Credit Card?
Yes, when shopping online, choose a UPI application like GPay, PhonePe, or Paytm as your payment method. Log into your UPI app, select FIRST Digital RuPay Credit Card, authenticate with your UPI PinPIN, and complete the purchase.
Can I send UPI payments to individuals or other credit cards using my FIRST Digital RuPay Credit Card?
No, only merchant payments as authorised by NPCI are permitted using the FIRST Digital RuPay Credit Card.
Can I set my linked credit card as the default account to receive funds?
No, you cannot set your credit card as the default for receiving funds
What is the credit limit for my FIRST Digital RuPay Credit Card?
The credit limit remains the same for both your existing card and the FIRST Digital RuPay Credit Card and is shared between the two.
Do benefits and privileges from my existing card apply to my digital card?
Benefits and privileges apply only to your existing credit card and not to First Digital RuPay Credit Card UPI transactions.
How do I pay my FIRST Digital RuPay Credit Card bill?
Payments are combined and reflected in the primary credit card statement. You can pay through the IDFC FIRST Bank app, net banking, NEFT, cheque, or the auto-debit facility.
Can I pay my credit card bill via UPI?
Yes, you can use your linked savings account on the UPI app to pay your credit card bill.
Can I use my digital card at offline merchants?
Yes, you can make payments at offline merchants with UPI-enabled POS machines.
Do I get alerts for FIRST Digital RuPay Credit Card transactions?
Yes, every UPI transaction on your FIRST Digital RuPay Credit Card will trigger an SMS alert to your registered number. For more details on RuPay Credit Card on UPI refer NPCI website
https://www.npci.org.in/what-we-do/rupay/rupay-credit-card-on-upi
I am receiving Error message while making the payment using FIRST Digital RuPay Credit Card? What should I do?
In case of UPI merchant related issue, customer can report the case for resolution to NPCI on their official website and provide details under “UPI Complaint” section.
NPCI link to raise complaint -
https://www.npci.org.in/what-we-do/upi/dispute-redressal-mechanism
Can I send UPI payments to individuals or other credit cards using my FIRST Digital RuPay Credit Card?
No, only merchant payments as authorised by NPCI are permitted using the FIRST Digital RuPay Credit Card.
This is done to ensure that people don’t revolve credit by transferring money to bank accounts of friends and relatives. Any payment being made to an UPI ID or QR code that belongs to an individual and not to a merchant will fail or get denied. So, for instance if an auto driver offers his personal and not business UPI QR code for payment, then you can’t pay for your ride using the credit card
Can I activate UPI on my VISA & Mastercard?
If you have a VISA/Mastercard, you can activate a companion RuPay credit card to make UPI payments. IDFC FIRST Bank offers a digital card linked to your Primary credit card within the overall Credit limit assigned to the IDFC FIRST Bank primary credit card that you have.
Can I make UPI payments through my Credit Card as well?
UPI payment is now available to IDFC FIRST Bank Credit Card users –not every merchant has a point-of-sale machine, whereas now even a roadside snacks stall has a UPI QR code. All such payments that a credit card holder had to compulsorily make from their bank’s savings accounts can now be done via IDFC FIRST Bank credit cards.
What makes this card different from other RuPay credit cards?
The IDFC FIRST Bank Digital RuPay Credit Card stands out from other RuPay credit cards by being completely digital-first, meaning you can start using it instantly post-approval through UPI apps without waiting for a physical card. It supports seamless UPI payments via credit, contactless tap-to-pay, and online transactions while offering benefits like lifetime- free membership, cashback, and reward points even on UPI spends—features not commonly found in other RuPay credit cards.
How does a digital-first RuPay credit card work?
A digital-first RuPay credit card works entirely through virtual means. Once your application for the IDFC FIRST Bank Digital RuPay Credit Card is approved, you receive the card details digitally. These details can be added to UPI apps for making credit-based payments using UPI. You can also use the card for online shopping and tap-to-pay at NFC-enabled terminals using a smartphone or smartwatch. This eliminates the need for physical card issuance unless specifically requested.
Is the FIRST Digital RuPay card accepted at all RuPay-enabled merchants?
The IDFC FIRST Bank Digital RuPay Credit Card is accepted across all RuPay-enabled merchants in India. Whether you are paying online or at a physical store, you can use the card wherever RuPay cards are accepted. This includes a growing number of offline retail outlets, fuel stations, restaurants, and e-commerce platforms supporting RuPay infrastructure.
What is the transaction limit for RuPay credit cards?
The transaction limit for RuPay credit cards like the IDFC FIRST Bank Digital RuPay Credit Card depends on your individual card limit, which is assigned based on creditworthiness. For UPI transactions using RuPay credit cards, NPCI allows up to ₹1 lakh per day per card, subject to issuer-specific limits and merchant category restrictions.
Can RuPay credit cards be used internationally?
While RuPay is currently a domestic card network, select RuPay cards issued under the RuPay JCB or Discover partnerships can be used internationally. However, the IDFC FIRST Bank Digital RuPay Credit Card is primarily designed for domestic use and is best suited for transactions within India, especially for UPI and digital payments. International usage may not be supported unless explicitly enabled or offered under a co-branded variant.
How secure are RuPay credit cards for digital payments?
RuPay credit cards, including the IDFC FIRST Bank Digital RuPay Credit Card, are extremely secure for digital transactions. They come with advanced security protocols such as two-factor authentication, encrypted tokenisation, OTP-based authorisations, and fraud monitoring systems. Since the card is digital-first, sensitive card details are never shared directly during payments, reducing the risk of misuse.
What is the daily transaction limit for UPI payments using this card?
The daily UPI transaction limit for RuPay credit cards is ₹1,00,000, as per NPCI guidelines. However, IDFC FIRST Bank may set specific internal limits based on your credit profile. Additionally, some UPI apps may impose their own transaction limits for credit card usage via UPI. Always refer to your card’s terms and your app settings for the most accurate information.
What are the cashback offers on the FIRST Digital RuPay credit card?
The FIRST Digital RuPay Credit Card by IDFC FIRST Bank offers attractive cashback and reward benefits. the RuPay credit card provides up to 3X reward points on UPI credit spends—a unique feature among credit cards—enhancing the overall value.
What is a digital-only RuPay credit card?
A digital-only RuPay credit card exists in a completely virtual format. Upon approval, users receive their card details via secure channels without physical card delivery. These cards are designed for use on mobile wallets, UPI apps, and online platforms. The IDFC FIRST Bank Digital RuPay Credit Card is a prime example, offering full functionality across UPI, POS, and contactless ecosystems without requiring a physical card.
Is tokenisation required for digital RuPay cards?
Yes, tokenisation is required for digital RuPay cards to enhance transaction security. When you add your IDFC FIRST Bank Digital RuPay Credit Card to a digital payment app or wallet, the actual card number is replaced with a unique token. This token is used during transactions, preventing exposure of actual card details and safeguarding against fraud or misuse.
How to increase the credit limit on a RuPay credit card?
To increase your transaction or credit limit on the IDFC FIRST Bank Digital RuPay Credit Card, you may follow these steps:
1. Visit IDFC FIRST Bank’s net banking or mobile app.
2. Navigate to ‘Credit Cards’ and check the ‘Limit Increase’ section.
3. If eligible, submit a limit enhancement request or upload income proof.
4. Alternatively, contact customer care or visit the nearest branch.
The approval is subject to the bank’s credit assessment policies.
Can RuPay cards be used for contactless payments?
Yes, RuPay cards—including the IDFC FIRST Bank Digital RuPay Credit Card—can be used for contactless tap-to-pay payments. If the card is added to a compatible digital wallet or NFC-enabled device (like Google Pay or Samsung Pay), you can simply tap your phone on any NFC-enabled POS terminal to complete the transaction securely and swiftly.
What makes IDFC FIRST Bank’s RuPay card better for UPI payments?
The IDFC FIRST Bank Digital RuPay Credit Card is better for UPI payments due to its seamless integration with UPI platforms and rewards on UPI transactions—benefits rarely available together. It eliminates the need for separate wallets, allowing you to pay directly via UPI while earning rewards and managing spends through a credit line.
Are there cashback/rewards on UPI transactions with the FIRST Digital RuPay Card?
Yes, one of the unique features of the IDFC FIRST Bank Digital RuPay Credit Card is that it offers up to 3X reward points and attractive cashback deals even on UPI transactions—a benefit not commonly provided by most credit cards. This makes daily UPI payments more rewarding, whether you are paying for groceries, food delivery, or utility bills.
Are digital RuPay cards safe for online shopping?
Yes, digital RuPay cards are highly secure for online shopping. They come with features like tokeniszation, OTP-based authentication, and real-time transaction alerts. Additionally, since the IDFC FIRST Bank Digital RuPay Credit Card does not require physical presence, the risk of card theft or cloning is minimised during online transactions.
Do I earn rewards on offline POS transactions with this digital card?
Yes, you can earn rewards on offline POS transactions using your IDFC FIRST Bank Digital RuPay Credit Card. Once the card is linked to a mobile wallet or used via contactless methods, all eligible retail transactions at physical stores are rewarded according to the card’s reward structure, just like any traditional credit card.
Can I use my Digital RuPay credit card for international online purchases?
As of now, the IDFC FIRST Bank Digital RuPay Credit Card is primarily intended for domestic transactions within India. However, it RuPay is expanding internationally with tie-ups with global payment channels like Discover Financial Services and more, so it may work on international websites if the merchant supports RuPay or the card is co-branded with an international partner.
Can I convert large UPI transactions to EMIs later?
Yes, IDFC FIRST Bank offers the option to convert eligible large UPI credit transactions into easy EMIs. You can initiate this through the IDFC FIRST Bank mobile app or net banking platform shortly after the transaction is completed. This feature is ideal for managing high-value purchases made via UPI without impacting your monthly budget.
Does this card support UPI AutoPay for subscriptions?
AutoPay can be used for subscriptions. It allows users to set up recurring payments for various services like OTT subscriptions, utility bills, and more through the UPI system. UPI AutoPay is a convenient way to ensure subscriptions are paid automatically on time.
How to share payment links via a RuPay credit card on UPI?
To share a payment link using your RuPay credit card via UPI:
1. Open your UPI app linked with the IDFC FIRST Bank Digital RuPay Credit Card.
2. Go to the ‘Request Money’ or ‘Collect via Credit Card’ option.
3. Enter the payer’s UPI ID or mobile number and the amount.
4. Generate and share the payment link with the recipient.
Upon payment, the amount is credited to your UPI-linked account and charged to your credit card balance.
Can I request a physical card later if needed?
No, the IDFC FIRST Bank Digital RuPay Credit Card is a digital-only card and cannot be issued as a physical card.
What is Reward redemption value for booking hotel and flights via FIRST Rewards Gallery section on IDFC FIRST Bank Mobile App?
On travel bookings (hotel & flights only) done via FIRST Rewards Gallery section on IDFC FIRST Bank Mobile App, below mentioned is the Reward Redemption value:
for FIRST Private & Gaj: Credit Card : 1 Reward point = ₹1
for Ashva 1 Reward Point = ₹0.40 and  for Mayura it is ₹0.50
for FIRST Millennia, FIRST Classic, FIRST Select, FIRST Wealth, FIRST Family, FIRST WOW! , FIRST WOW! Black, Diamond Reserve, FIRST Business & Business Multiplier Credit Card: 1 Reward Point = ₹0.25
Reward account for Primary Credit Card and Digital Card will be same. Reward redemption to be done through Primary Credit Card only.

FIRST Power+ Credit Card: Maximum Fuel Benefits with Everyday Rewards
Maximise your savings on everyday expenses like fuel, grocery, and FASTag recharges. The FIRST Power+ Credit Card enhances your fuel savings while extending value to non-fuel spends as well. Designed for daily commuters, it offers stronger fuel-related benefits along with rewards on shopping, dining, travel, and lifestyle expenses. If you want a card that prioritises fuel savings without limiting overall usability, FIRST Power+ delivers a balanced combination of savings, rewards, and convenience for your daily financial needs.

Get ₹500 worth welcome benefit# on 1st HPCL fuel transaction of ₹500 or above
#Please note- For cards setup till June 9, 2025, the benefit is given as cashback. For cards setup June 10, 2025, onwards, the benefit is given as gift voucher.
Eligibility:
For cards set-up till June 9, 2025, 1st HPCL fuel transaction of ₹500 or above to be done within 30 days of cards set-up.
For cards set-up June 10,2025, onwards, 1st HPCL fuel transaction of ₹500 or above to be done within 60 days of cards set-up.
Spends done only on Primary Card are eligible for Welcome benefit
Fulfilment:
For cards set-up till June 9, 2025, the cashback shall be credited within 45 days from the card setup.
For cards set-up June 10, 2025, onwards, gift voucher will be issued within 75 days of card set-up and can be redeemed within 90 days of voucher issuance.
Only cardholders who have paid the Joining Fee will be eligible for this offer.
Exclusion:
Not applicable on UPI and Add-on card transactions.
If the transaction is reversed/cancelled/disputed by the cardholder or merchant, the welcome benefit will not be processed. Know More
Up to ₹1,000 cashback on your first EMI
Enjoy 5% cashback of up to ₹1,000 on your first EMI transaction within the first 30 days card set-up*.
*30 days from the day you receive SMS/email confirmation of card set-up.
Eligibility:
This offer is applicable only on first EMI conversion within first 30 days of card set-up.
Fulfilment:
Eligible customers will receive cashback within 90 days of the offer end date
Exclusion:
Transactions done on gold and jewellery are not eligible for EMI conversion.
If the customer is delinquent at the time of offer fulfilment, that customer will not be eligible for the offer.
If any of the transactions are reversed/cancelled/foreclosed by the cardholder or merchant, that EMI transaction will be not be considered. Similarly for any disputed transaction by the cardholder, that EMI transaction will not be considered Know More

Fees & Charges
Joining Fee & Annual Fee : ₹499
Annual fee ₹499, reversed on crossing ₹1,50,000 spends in the previous anniversary year
₹1,50,000 spends milestone includes all the purchases (excluding ATM Cash Withdrawal, Balance Transfer, monthly EMIs, fees and charges) net of reversals/refunds
Payment of Joining Fee + GST is required for activation and dispatch of FIRST Power+ Credit Card
Low-Interest Rates
Low Interest Rates (APR), from 0.71% to 3.85% per month (8.5% to 46.2% per annum)
OVL Charges
– 2.5% of the over-limit amount subject to a minimum charge of ₹550
Late Payment Fee  - 15% of Total Amount Due (subject to a minimum of ₹100 and a maximum of ₹1300)
Interest-free ATM Cash Withdrawals
For up to 45 days (cash withdrawal fee of only ₹199 per transaction)

Lower Interest Rates
• Usually, other credit cards charge a standard and fixed interest rate as high as 42% p.a. , in case you carry forward your outstanding balance beyond the payment due date.
• IDFC FIRST Bank Credit Cards offer low and dynamic interest rates starting from 8.5% per annum. The interest rates stated are typically ‘yearly’ rates, also known as the annual percentage rate (APR). No Interest is charged if you repay your balance in full, each month by the due date. We recommend that you always pay Total Amount Due of your credit card to avoid any charges. Paying Minimum Amount Due each month is mandatory.

0% Interest on Cash Withdrawal
IDFC FIRST Bank Credit Cards offer ATM cash withdrawals at 0% interest until your due date.

• With IDFC FIRST Bank offering India’s best credit card interest rates, you pay zero interest until your due date for payment and at a flat transaction fee of just ₹199/- only.

Frequently Asked Questions
Effective 18th June 2026, what changes are being made to the FIRST Power/ FIRST Power+ Credit Card?
There will be revisions to select features and the applicable Terms & Conditions of the FIRST Power Credit Card.  Click here  for detailed information on FIRST Power Credit Card.
Click here  for detailed information on FIRST Power+ Credit Card.
Is the UPI on Credit Card facility available on the FIRST Power/ FIRST Power+ Credit Cards?
Yes, the UPI on Credit Card facility is available on the FIRST Power and FIRST Power+ Credit Cards. You can now scan UPI-enabled merchant QR codes and pay using your FIRST Power/ FIRST Power+ Credit Card.
However, you must ensure that you have linked the credit cards to a UPI app. Currently, the supported apps include BHIM, PhonPe, Paytm, GPay, Freecharge, Slice, Cred and Mobikwik.
How to use the FIRST Power and FIRST Power+ Credit Cards?
You can use the FIRST Power and FIRST Power+ Credit Cards like any other credit card. These cards get you extra savings as rewards on HPCL fuel payments, grocery & utility and other everyday expenses.
Who can apply for a FIRST Power / FIRST Power+ Credit Card?
You can apply for the FIRST Power / FIRST Power+ Credit Card, if you meet the eligibility criteria below*:
•   You must be at least 21 years old
•  You must be an Indian citizen
•  You must have a healthy credit score
•  Your credit usage ratio must be within an acceptable level
•  You must have an Annual Income of ₹3 lacs or more
*Issuance of Credit Card is subject to bank's internal assessment and at the sole discretion of IDFC FIRST Bank.
I already hold an IDFC FIRST Bank Credit Card, will I be able to apply for FIRST Power / FIRST Power+ Credit Card?
Yes, you can apply only for FIRST Power+ Credit Card even if you already hold any of IDFC FIRST Bank Credit Cards . However, the credit limit will be shared with all your existing IDFC FIRST Bank Credit Cards.
How do I get the FIRST Power and FIRST Power+ Credit Card?
You can apply for the HPCL fuel credit card on IDFC FIRST Bank website online and IDFC FIRST Mobile Banking App. You can also visit your nearby IDFC FIRST Bank branch to apply for the card. Click here to apply for the credit card online.
How many types of fuel credit cards can I apply for?
The HPCL Fuel Credit Card by IDFC FIRST Bank comes in two options – FIRST Power and FIRST Power+. You can opt for any one of these variants, depending on your needs. Click here to apply for the credit card online.
How do I calculate fuel points earned by my spending?
With the FIRST Power+ Credit Card, for every ₹150 spent, you earn 30X Reward Points on HPCL fuel spends, Grocery & Utility and IDFC FASTag recharge. You earn 3X Reward Points on other retail transactions, subject to terms & conditions. Similarly, with the FIRST Power Credit Card, for every ₹150 spent, you earn 21X Reward Points on HPCL fuel spend, 15X Reward Points on Grocery, Utility and IDFC FASTag recharges. You earn 2X Reward Points on other retail transactions, subject to terms & conditions. Additionally, on both these variants, you also earn 6 Happy Coins for every ₹100 spend through the HP Pay App.
How do I save on fuelling through HP Pay App?
You can enjoy an additional savings of 1.5% by earning Happy Coins along with regular credit card savings when paying through HP Pay App at HPCL fuel stations. The HP Pay App offers two convenient ways of payment i.e. through scanning QR or wallet upload. Here is how you can save more with HP Pay App:
• You earn 6 Happy Coins per ₹100 fuel spends through HP Pay App
• When using the app to pay via QR, you get 4 Happy Coins on payment and 2 Happy Coins within the first 30 days of payment
• When using the app to pay via wallet, you earn 3 Happy Coins at the time of wallet upload, and 2 Happy Coins within the first 30 days of wallet upload and 1 Happy Coin at the time of payment.
• You can earn a maximum of 600 Happy Coins in a month with a max spend capping of ₹10,000.
Is fuel cheaper with a fuel card?
Fuel is not cheaper with a Fuel Card. However, the spends done on fuel with a Fuel Card brings savings through accelerated Reward Points. With the FIRST Power and FIRST Power+ Credit Cards, you can earn 21X and 30X Reward Points on fuel spends done at HPCL outlets.
What is the income eligibility criteria to apply for a FIRST Power Credit Card?
To be eligible for a FIRST Power Credit Card, you must have an annual income of ₹ 3 Lacs or more
*Issuance of our Credit Card is subject to bank's internal assessment and at the sole discretion of IDFC FIRST Bank.
Is there a joining offer for the FIRST Power and FIRST Power+ Credit Cards?
Yes, there is. If you have a FIRST Power+ Credit Card, you will receive a ₹500 Gift Voucher on your first HPCL fuel transaction of ₹500 or more, made within 30 days of card generation.
For the FIRST Power Credit Card, you will get a ₹250  Gift Voucher on your first HPCL fuel transaction of ₹250 or more, made within 30 days of card generation.
Please note: The joining offer is valid only if the joining fee has been paid in full.
Which UPI apps can I link my FIRST Power or Power+ Credit Card with?
You can currently link your FIRST Power and Power+ Credit Card with all UPI apps, including BHIM, PhonePe, Paytm, Google Pay, Freecharge, Slice, CRED, and Mobikwik. Link your FIRST Power or Power+ Credit Card to UPI in just a few steps. Click here to activate UPI now.
How can I set a UPI PIN for my FIRST Power or Power+ Credit Card?
To set your UPI PIN:
• Select your IDFC FIRST Bank Credit Card from the linked credit card accounts on your UPI app
• Choose the ‘Set UPI PIN’ option
• Enter the last 6 digits of your credit card and the expiry date
• Follow the steps shown to complete the setup
How do I make a UPI payment using my FIRST Power or Power+ Credit Card?
Once your card is linked:
• Open your preferred UPI app
• Tap ‘Scan’ to scan the QR code
• Enter the amount
• Select your FIRST Power or Power+ Credit Card from the payment options
• Authenticate the transaction using your UPI PIN
You’ll receive a confirmation once the payment is successfully processed.
Can I change my UPI PIN?
Yes, you can change the UPI pin of your FIRST Power or Power+ Credit Card account by selecting ‘Change UPI PIN’ option present on your UPI applications.
What if I change my mobile number? How do I continue using my card on UPI apps?
If you change your mobile number:
• First, update your new number in your credit card account with IDFC FIRST Bank
• Then, re-register your card on your preferred UPI app using the updated number.
Can I make payments to any person or other credit card using the linked FIRST Power or Power+ Credit Card on UPI?
No. Payments from your linked FIRST Power or Power+ Credit Card are allowed only to merchants (P2M transactions), not to individuals or other credit card accounts.
Are there any merchant categories where credit card payments via UPI are restricted?
Yes, payments are restricted for the following categories:
• Peer-to-peer (P2P) and peer-to-peer-merchant (P2PM) transfers
• Digital account opening
• Lending platforms
• Cash withdrawals (at merchants or ATMs)
• e-RUPI, IPO applications, foreign inward remittances, mutual funds
• And any other categories restricted by the National Payments Corporation of India (NPCI)
Can I make the payment of my Credit Card bill using UPI?
Yes, you can pay your credit card bill via UPI using your linked savings account . For recurring payments, you can also set up UPI AutoPay .
Can I link my existing Visa/ Mastercard Credit Card on UPI?
Currently, only IDFC FIRST Bank Credit Cards powered by RuPay can be linked on UPI.
Is there any limit on the transaction amount made from my linked FIRST Power or Power+ Credit Card on UPI?
Yes.
• You can transact up to ₹1 lakh per day
• For specific merchant categories (MCCs), the limit may go up to ₹2 lakh per day
• During the first 24 hours after linking your card, the daily transaction limit is ₹5,000
All transactions are also subject to the available credit limit on your card.
Will I be charged for linking or carrying out any transaction from my linked FIRST Power or Power+ Credit Card on UPI?
No, you will not be charged for linking or carrying out any transaction from the linked Credit Card on UPI.
Can I make my linked FIRST Power or Power+ Credit Card as default account to receive funds?
No, credit cards cannot be set as the default option to receive incoming UPI payments.
Why am I being asked to pay the Joining Fee to receive my credit card?
IDFC FIRST Bank believes in complete transparency, and we want our customers to make an informed decision about their Joining Fee and its associated benefits. By asking for Joining fee payment, we are aligning with our core values of openness and trust, ensuring you have full cognizance about the applicable fee, before committing to our credit card. This process allows you to make a conscious choice in a responsible and transparent manner. By choosing this process we also aim to minimize wastage due to cancelled and returned cards.
I can't wait to receive my card. Where can I pay the Joining Fee?
You will receive communication from the bank to pay the joining fee as soon as your credit card application is approved.
For FIRST Power+ - You can pay the Joining Fee of ₹499+GST by clicking here
For FIRST Power - You can pay the Joining Fee of ₹199+GST by clicking here
On the next page you must authenticate using the mobile number and date of birth as mentioned during the card application. The payment can be made using UPI and net banking.
My FIRST Power+/Power Credit Card application is approved but I am awaiting my credit card to be delivered.
Once your FIRST Power+/Power Credit Card application is approved, Joining Fee payment of ₹499+GST for FIRST Power+ and ₹199+GST for FIRST Power is required to get the credit card dispatched.
Upon issuance, I can see the digital card in the mobile banking app, but I cannot use it for online purchases.
As per the process, Joining Fee payment is required to activate your digital card and dispatch of the card.
On card application approval, you will receive communication to pay the Joining Fee.
What is the FIRST Power+ Credit Card by IDFC FIRST Bank?
The FIRST Power+ is a Fuel Credit Card  specifically designed for individuals who spend significantly on fuel, groceries, and utilities. It offers up to ₹18,500 in annual savings, which is equivalent to over 175 litres of fuel cost. With lifestyle privileges, fuel savings   with  enhanced reward points, the FIRST Power+ Card is ideal for those who live life in the fast lane.
What are the key features of the HPCL-cobranded FIRST Power+ Credit Card?
With the FIRST Power+ Fuel Credit Card, you can:
• Get up to 6.5% savings on fuel spends at HPCL pumps, contributing to an annual savings of up to ₹18,500 which is enough to buy 175 litres of fuel. Enjoy 5% rewards on grocery & utility bills and 5% rewards on an IDFC FIRST Bank FASTag recharge. Additionally, earn 3X Rewards on other retail spends for comprehensive savings.
• Enjoy welcome benefits worth ₹2,500: ₹500 gift voucher on 1st HPCL fuel transaction of ₹500 or more, 5% cashback on your 1st EMI conversion (up to ₹1,000), and exciting merchant offers worth ₹1,000
• Avail complimentary domestic airport lounge access, once per quarter (on ₹20,000 monthly spends)
• Get 25% off on movie tickets (up to ₹100 per month) and complimentary roadside assistance worth ₹1,399.
• Secure yourself with a personal accident cover of ₹2 lakh and lost card liability cover of ₹25,000.
• Dynamic interest rates starting at 8.5% p.a. and 0% interest on ATM cash withdrawals until the due date with just a cash withdrawal fee of ₹199 +GST for every transaction.
Is this a lifetime-free credit card, or does it have an annual fee?
The  FIRST Power+ credit card comes with a joining fee of ₹499 + GST and same as the annual fee thereafter. The annual fee is waived off on spending ₹150,000 or more in the previous year.
FIRST Power Credit Cards levy a joining/annual fee of ₹199 + GST. The annual fee is waived off on a yearly spending of ₹50,000 in the previous year.
Who is eligible for theFIRST Power+ Fuel Credit Card?
To be eligible for the  FIRST Power+ Credit Card, you should:
• Be an Indian resident
• Be at least 21 years old (salaried) or 25 years old (self-employed)
• Have a stable monthly income
• Hold a good credit score
• Meet IDFC FIRST Bank’s internal credit policies
What fuel surcharge waiver benefits does this card offer
IDFC FIRST Bank’s FIRST Power+ Credit Cards do not offer surcharge benefits on fuel purchases. However, they come with the industry’s best savings rewards on fuel expenses, offering 30X rewards for every ₹150 spend with the FIRST Power+ Credit Card and 21X reward for every ₹150 spend with the FIRST Power Credit Card. Thus, offering savings that surpass the fuel surcharge waiver benefits.
How much cashback/rewards can I earn on fuel spends at HPCL pumps?
With the FIRST Power+ Credit Card, you can earn up to  6.5% savings  as rewards on your fuel expenses. Offering annual savings of up to ₹18,500 which is enough to buy 175+ litres of fuel annually.
With the FIRST Power Credit Card, the fuel savings are  up to 5% , and you get ₹250  gift voucher on your first HPCL transaction of ₹250 or more, with a total yearly savings potential of up to ₹7,000.
What are the key benefits of a fuel credit card?
Fuel credit cards like the IDFC FIRST Power and Power+ Credit Cards offer benefits tailored to high-frequency vehicle users:
• eEnhanced Rewards on fuel, utility, FASTag, and grocery spends
• Travel and lifestyle, entertainment privileges
• Complimentary roadside assistance
• Purchase protection and card security
These advantages go beyond regular credit cards by aligning rewards with your mobility expenses.
What’s the difference between a fuel credit card and a regular credit card?
A  fuel credit card  is focused on providing benefits for fuel-related transactions, including bonus rewards at partner fuel stations. For instance:
• IDFC FIRST Bank’s FIRST Power+ gives up to 6.5% fuel savings
• Regular credit cards typically offer lower or no rewards for fuel spends
Moreover, fuel cards for IDFC FIRST Bank offer added perks such as FASTag rewards, and road assistance, which regular cards may not.
What credit score is needed to get a fuel credit card?
A  credit score of 730 or above  is typically recommended to increase your chances of approval for the FIRST Power+ Fuel Credit Card. However, approval also depends on other criteria such as income, repayment history, and existing liabilities.
HPCL vs. BPCL vs. IOCL fuel credit cards – which is better?
If you frequently refuel at  HPCL fuel stations , the IDFC FIRST Power+ Credit Card is highly recommended:
• Up to 6.5% fuel savings with the FIRST Power+ Credit Card
• ₹500 Gift voucher on first HPCL Fuel transaction of ₹500 and above
• FASTag, groceries, and utility rewards
• Lifetime-free with premium privileges
BPCL and IOCL co-branded cards may offer similar benefits at their respective outlets, but the holistic lifestyle and mobility savings offered by FIRST Power+ are more comprehensive and versatile.
Do fuel credit cards work at all petrol stations, or only partnered ones?
Fuel credit cards like IDFC FIRST Bank’s FIRST Power and Power+ Credit Cards are  o ptimal for spending at HPCL fuel stations as it pays you back with reward points. While these cards may work at other petrol pumps, the reward benefits apply only at HPCL outlets .
Can existing credit card holders apply for a fuel card as an add-on?
Yes, IDFC FIRST Bank allows you to  extend an Add-on card  to your family member. This helps boost your combined savings and gives your add-on cardholder access to most card benefits. Existing customers can also apply separately for a new fuel card if they qualify.
Do fuel credit cards offer rewards on non-fuel purchases?
Both FIRST Power+ and Power Fuel Cards offer extensive rewards on non-fuel spends:
• FIRST Power+ : 5% on groceries & utility bills, 5% on FASTag, 3X rewards on all other retail spends
• FIRST Power : 2.5% on groceries & utility, 2.5% on FASTag, 2X rewards on retail spends
This makes them highly versatile for everyday usage, not just for refuelling.
How do I redeem cashback earned from a fuel credit card?
Rewards earned through the IDFC FIRST POWER+ fuel cards can be  redeemed via the IDFC FIRST Bank app or internet banking  portal. You may need to pay a redemption charge of ₹99 + GST. Redemption is simple, transparent, and adds value to every rupee you spend.

LIC Classic Credit Card: Protection and Rewards in One Card
Take the first step towards a rewarding financial journey with the LIC Classic Credit Card by IDFC FIRST Bank. With a simplified reward structure, this lifetime-free card helps you earn 6X rewards on LIC premium payments. You also get complimentary access to airport and railway lounges, as well as attractive welcome benefits worth ₹3,000. With simple features, no annual fees, and unmatched rewards structure , it offers a dependable way to build credit responsibly. Choose this card for reliability and everyday convenience.
LIC Classic
LIC Select
A credit card that secures your tomorrow, while rewarding your today. This credit card offers supersized rewards on LIC premium payments and other daily spends. These rewards can be redeemed anywhere online, even to fund your next LIC premium payment. That’s not all, there are lifestyle privileges like airport & railway lounge access, road-side assistance and insurance covers.

Other FAQs
Effective 18th June 2026, what changes are being made to the LIC Classic Credit Card?
There will be revisions to select features and the applicable Terms & Conditions of the LIC Classic Credit Card.  Click here  for detailed information.
Is there a Joining/ Membership/ Annual fee on LIC IDFC FIRST Bank Credit Cards?
There is absolutely no Joining/ Membership/ Annual fee applicable on LIC IDFC FIRST Bank Credit Cards. Your card is free for life.
How can I redeem the reward points that I have earned on my card?
You can directly use your points to pay for your online purchases or when shopping at a store. Just choose the option to ‘pay with points’. You can also redeem your reward points against amazing offers at  https://firstrewards.in/
Is there an expiry date on the reward points accrued on my LIC IDFC FIRST Bank Credit Card?
Your reward points have a validity of 3 years from the date when reward points are earned.
What are the offers available on LIC IDFC FIRST Bank Credit Cards?
LIC IDFC FIRST Bank Credit Cards are loaded with a host of benefits, offers and features. Depending on the card variant, IDFC FIRST Bank credit cards offer Lifestyle benefits like discounts on shopping, dining or movies and complimentary rounds of golf every month; travel benefits like complimentary airport lounge access; and other benefits like in-app online discounts, and discounts at health and wellness outlets.
What is the interest rate(APR) on my credit card?
IDFC FIRST Bank Credit Cards offer among the lowest interest rates in the country, starting from 9% to 42% per annum, so it won’t weigh on your pocket if you can’t clear your entire monthly dues occasionally.
Effective 20th February 2025, APR range will be revised to 8.5% - 46.2% per annum
Can I use my credit card to withdraw cash at an ATM?
Yes, you can! And what’s really great is that all ATM cash withdrawals are totally interest-free for
up to 45 days – in India or even when you withdraw cash abroad. Do keep in mind, however, that a
Cash Advance Fee of only ₹199 is applicable per transaction, irrespective of where you are or the
amount you withdraw.​
How do I generate my credit card PIN?
Net Banking
Pre Login:
Click on the “Generate Credit Card PIN” on the pre-login page [ https://my.idfcfirst.bank.in/login ]
Enter “Customer ID” & “Credit Card number” and click on Get OTP
Verify using the OTP sent on your registered mobile number
Enter and Re-enter PIN of your choice and click on confirm
Your Credit Card PIN is set
Login:
Login to your Net Banking account
Select Credit Card section
Select Set new PIN
Enter and Re-enter PIN of your choice and click on Get OTP
Please verify through the OTP sent to your registered mobile number
Your Credit Card PIN is set
Mobile Banking App
Pre-login:
Select browse icon from the right side top menu on login page
Enter “Customer ID” & “Credit Card number” and click on Get OTP
Please verify through the OTP sent to your registered mobile number
Enter and Re-enter PIN of your choice and click on confirm
Your Credit Card PIN is set
Login:
Login to Mobile Banking App
Access Credit Card section
Select Set new PIN
Enter and Re-enter PIN of your choice and click on Get OTP
Your Credit Card PIN is set
Customer Care:
Dial our Customer Care and follow the instructions to generate the PIN
Will I be asked for my Credit Card PIN at every POS terminal, be it domestic or international?
For all transactions in India, yes, you will be asked for a PIN for completing the transactions. However, outside India, you will be asked for the PIN only if the POS terminal is enabled for PIN authentication.
How are LIC IDFC FIRST Credit Cards different from normal Credit Cards?
LIC Co-branded credit cards offer exceptional rewards on LIC premium payments than a normal credit cards
I do not have a LIC Policy, Can I apply for LIC IDFC FIRST Credit Cards?
Yes
Where do I get my LIC IDFC FIRST Credit Card Statement?
Customer gets the credit card statement mailed as a pdf file. Also, one can have an overview of the statement in IDFC FIRST Bank mobile application.
What to do if I lose my LIC IDFC FIRST Bank Credit Card?
Customer needs to first block the credit card temporarily through mobile application or through customer care. Post that they can apply for replacement card again either from mobile application or through customer care.
I already have an IDFC FIRST Bank Credit Card. Can I apply for the LIC IDFC FIRST Bank Credit Card?
Existing IDFC FIRST Bank Credit Cardholders are not eligible to apply for LIC IDFC FIRST Bank Credit Card

LIC Select Credit Card: Premium Insurance Benefits with Lifestyle Privileges
Upgrade your lifestyle with the LIC Select Credit Card, a rewarding choice for LIC policyholders and savvy spenders alike. This lifetime-free card offers attractive rewards, exclusive privileges on travel spending, and 10X rewards on LIC premium payments. From shopping and dining to bill payments, complimentary roadside assistance as well as airport and railway lounge access, every expense turns into rewarding experience. With wide acceptance and premium features, this card helps you enjoy financial freedom without compromise. Apply now to experience trust and rewards together.
LIC Classic
LIC Select
A credit card that secures your tomorrow, while rewarding your today. This credit card offers supersized rewards on LIC premium payments and other daily spends. These rewards can be redeemed anywhere online, even to fund your next LIC premium payment. That’s not all, there are lifestyle privileges like airport & railway lounge access, road-side assistance and insurance covers.

Credit Card Basics
Frequently Asked Questions
Most Common
Card Features
Card PIN
Other FAQs
Effective 18th June 2026, what changes are being made to the LIC Select Credit Card?
There will be revisions to select features and the applicable Terms & Conditions of the LIC Select Credit Card.  Click here  for detailed information.
Is there a Joining/ Membership/ Annual fee on LIC IDFC FIRST Bank Credit Cards?
There is absolutely no Joining/ Membership/ Annual fee applicable on LIC IDFC FIRST Bank Credit Cards. Your card is free for life.
How can I redeem the reward points that I have earned on my card?
You can directly use your points to pay for your online purchases or when shopping at a store. Just choose the option to ‘pay with points’. You can also redeem your reward points against amazing offers at  https://firstrewards.in/
Is there an expiry date on the reward points accrued on my LIC IDFC FIRST Bank Credit Card?
Your reward points have a validity of 3 years from the date when reward points are earned.
What are the offers available on LIC IDFC FIRST Bank Credit Cards?
LIC IDFC FIRST Bank Credit Cards are loaded with a host of benefits, offers and features. Depending on the card variant, IDFC FIRST Bank credit cards offer Lifestyle benefits like discounts on shopping, dining or movies and complimentary rounds of golf every month; travel benefits like complimentary airport lounge access; and other benefits like in-app online discounts, and discounts at health and wellness outlets.
What is the interest rate(APR) on my credit card?
IDFC FIRST Bank Credit Cards offer among the lowest interest rates in the country, starting from 9% to 42% per annum, so it won’t weigh on your pocket if you can’t clear your entire monthly dues occasionally.
Effective 20th February 2025, APR range will be revised to 8.5% - 46.2% per annum
Can I use my credit card to withdraw cash at an ATM?
Yes, you can! And what’s really great is that all ATM cash withdrawals are totally interest-free for
up to 45 days – in India or even when you withdraw cash abroad. Do keep in mind, however, that a
Cash Advance Fee of only ₹199 is applicable per transaction, irrespective of where you are or the
amount you withdraw.​
How do I generate my credit card PIN?
Net Banking
Pre Login:
Click on the “Generate Credit Card PIN” on the pre-login page [ https://my.idfcfirst.bank.in/login ]
Enter “Customer ID” & “Credit Card number” and click on Get OTP
Verify using the OTP sent on your registered mobile number
Enter and Re-enter PIN of your choice and click on confirm
Your Credit Card PIN is set
Login:
Login to your Net Banking account
Select Credit Card section
Select Set new PIN
Enter and Re-enter PIN of your choice and click on Get OTP
Please verify through the OTP sent to your registered mobile number
Your Credit Card PIN is set
Mobile Banking App
Pre-login:
Select browse icon from the right side top menu on login page
Enter “Customer ID” & “Credit Card number” and click on Get OTP
Please verify through the OTP sent to your registered mobile number
Enter and Re-enter PIN of your choice and click on confirm
Your Credit Card PIN is set
Login:
Login to Mobile Banking App
Access Credit Card section
Select Set new PIN
Enter and Re-enter PIN of your choice and click on Get OTP
Your Credit Card PIN is set
Customer Care:
Dial our Customer Care and follow the instructions to generate the PIN
Will I be asked for my Credit Card PIN at every POS terminal, be it domestic or international?
For all transactions in India, yes, you will be asked for a PIN for completing the transactions. However, outside India, you will be asked for the PIN only if the POS terminal is enabled for PIN authentication.
How are LIC IDFC FIRST Credit Cards different from normal Credit Cards?
LIC Co-branded credit cards offer exceptional rewards on LIC premium payments than a normal credit cards
I do not have a LIC Policy, Can I apply for LIC IDFC FIRST Credit Cards?
Yes
Where do I get my LIC IDFC FIRST Credit Card Statement?
Customer gets the credit card statement mailed as a pdf file. Also, one can have an overview of the statement in IDFC FIRST Bank mobile application.
What to do if I lose my LIC IDFC FIRST Bank Credit Card?
Customer needs to first block the credit card temporarily through mobile application or through customer care. Post that they can apply for replacement card again either from mobile application or through customer care.
I already have an IDFC FIRST Bank Credit Card. Can I apply for the LIC IDFC FIRST Bank Credit Card?
Existing IDFC FIRST Bank Credit Cardholders are not eligible to apply for LIC IDFC FIRST Bank Credit Card

FAQs
Effective 18th June 2026, what changes are being made to the FIRST Business Credit Card?
There will be revisions to select features and the applicable Terms & Conditions of the FIRST Business Credit Card.  Click here  for detailed information.
How do I apply for a FIRST Business Credit Card?
If you do not hold any Current Account with IDFC FIRST Bank, you can click here to start the Do-It-Yourself digital application journey.
Is there a Joining/ Membership/ Annual fee on the FIRST Business Credit Card?
Yes. The card comes with a Joining Fee (1st year) of ₹499 + GST and an Annual Fee (2nd year onwards) of ₹999 + GST
Do I need a Current Account for a FIRST Business Credit Card?
No. Having Current account with IDFC FIRST Bank is not a requirement. However, with our Current Account we offer you best in class holistic Banking solutions including cash & expense management.
Which FIRST Business Credit Card Variant is right for me?
Choose between two variants* of the FIRST Business Credit Card:
Variant 1: With Low Interest Rate (APR) – starting at 1.5% p.m.
If your business needs instant working capital, more flexibility in payment and cash-flow management solutions, this card is for you!
Variant 2 – With higher rewards on business expenses –up to 10X Reward Points
If your business incurs higher expenses, in rent & utilities, and if you regularly spend on digital advertising or make payments in foreign currency this is the card for you!
What is the interest rate levied on delay / non-payment of dues on the FIRST Business Credit Card?
If you choose the Low Interest Rate variant, you get the following interest rates.
- Year 1 (Introductory Offer): 1.5% p.m.
- Year 2 onwards: 2% p.m. (lower than industry average)
If you choose High Reward Points Variant, you get an Interest Rate of 3% p.m.
For both variants, on paying any amount less than Minimum amount due interest will be charged at Monthly Rate 3.99% Annual Rate 47.88%
How many Reward Points do I get with the FIRST Business Credit Card?
If you choose the Low Interest Variant , you enjoy the following Reward Points
5X Reward Points on business spends in foreign currency transactions
2X Reward Points on business utility & digital advertising
1X Reward Points on rentals, restaurants & utility
If you choose the High Reward Points Variant , you enjoy the following Reward Points
10X Reward Points on business spends in foreign currency transactions
4X Reward Points on business utility & digital advertising
2X Reward Points on rentals, restaurants & utility
Are there any charges or limitations for redemption of Reward Points?
No. There are no charges for redemption of Reward points. Reward Points are never expiring and can be redeemed at any time.
Can I use my credit card to withdraw cash at an ATM?
Yes you can. You can withdraw cash up to 10% of the total Credit Limit.
Cash withdrawal charges = ₹199 + GST for each instance
How does the FIRST Business Credit Card help me manage my business expenses?
With the FIRST Business Credit Card you get
- A 45-day Interest free credit period. This is instant working capital for your business.
- A single view dashboard and annualised statements that help closely monitor your expenses and keep track of budgets.
- Option to get multiple cards for your employees/directors with individual credit limits and the option of Balance Transfer.
- An option to convert outstanding about to EMIs with Interest as low as 1.5% p.m
How many cards can be issued to employees / company staff? How do I manage expenses, Credit Limit, etc. for multiple cards?
There is no limit on the number of cards, as long as they collectively do not exceed the overall Credit Limit given to the Corporate/ Business.
Do I get complimentary airport lounge access with the FIRST Business Credit Card? How can I avail these benefits?
Yes. You get access to 2 international and/or domestic Airport Lounges per quarter on minimum spends of ₹20,000 on the previous month.
What is the Forex mark-up fees on the FIRST Business Credit Card? If my business has a lot of expenses in foreign currencies, how can I benefit with the FIRST Business Credit Card?
You get a low forex markup of 1.99%. This rate is very low compared to the market rates, which is generally around 3-3.5%. You can also benefit from your business spends in foreign currency with up to 10X Reward Points. (depending on the variant chosen)
Does the FIRST Business Credit Card offer any complimentary insurance?
Absolutely! You get the following insurance benefits with the FIRST Business Credit Card
- Free Road Side Assistance worth ₹1,499
- Personal Accident Cover of ₹10,00,000 on doing at least one transaction in the previous month
- Insurance Cover of ₹50,000 each on Lost card liability, Credit Shield and Purchase Protection
- Travel Insurance for
a. Loss of Checked-In Baggage - USD 500
b. Delay of Checked-In Baggage -USD 100
c. Loss of Passport and other documents - USD 300
d. Delay in Flight- USD 300
e. Air Accident Cover of ₹1,00,00,000
There will be revisions to select features and the applicable Terms & Conditions of the FIRST Business Credit Card.  Click here  for detailed information.
If you do not hold any Current Account with IDFC FIRST Bank, you can click here to start the Do-It-Yourself digital application journey.
Yes. The card comes with a Joining Fee (1st year) of ₹499 + GST and an Annual Fee (2nd year onwards) of ₹999 + GST
